Description: 1-day price return (close-to-close percentage change)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price

Description: 5-day cumulative price return
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 5 days

Description: 20-day cumulative price return (~1 month momentum)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 20 days

Description: 60-day cumulative price return (~3 month momentum)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 60 days

Description: 20-day simple moving average of closing price (raw dollar value)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 20 days

Description: 50-day simple moving average of closing price (raw dollar value)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 50 days

Description: 200-day simple moving average of closing price (raw dollar value)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 200 days

Description: 200-day exponential moving average of closing price (raw dollar value)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 200 days

Description: Current price divided by 20-day SMA (>1 means above average; normalized)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price and trailing 20 days

Description: Current price divided by 50-day SMA (>1 means above average; normalized)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price and trailing 50 days

Description: Current price divided by 200-day SMA (>1 means above long-term average; normalized)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's price and trailing 200 days

Description: Signal when price crosses the 200-day MA: +1 = bullish cross (above) / -1 = bearish cross (below) / 0 = no cross
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's close vs SMA_200

Description: Number of trading days since the most recent SMA 200 cross event
Time Alignment: Computed from historical cross events

Description: Annualized standard deviation of daily returns over 20 days (short-term risk)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 20 days

Description: Annualized standard deviation of daily returns over 60 days (medium-term risk)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 60 days

Description: Today's volume divided by 20-day average volume (>1 means above-average trading activity)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's volume and trailing 20 days

Description: Binary flag (0 or 1): set to 1 when today's volume exceeds 1.5x the 20-day average
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's volume and trailing 20 days

Description: Continuous ratio of today's volume to 20-day average (e.g. 2.5 = volume is 2.5x average)
Time Alignment: Computed from that day's volume and trailing 20 days

Description: Relative Strength Index over 14 days (0-100; >70 overbought, <30 oversold)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 14 days

Description: Moving Average Convergence Divergence: 12-day EMA minus 26-day EMA (momentum oscillator)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 26 days

Description: MACD histogram: MACD minus its 9-day signal line (measures momentum acceleration)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 35 days

Description: Bollinger Band width: (upper - lower) / middle band (measures price volatility envelope)
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 20 days

Description: Position within Bollinger Bands: 0 = at lower band, 1 = at upper band, 0.5 = at middle
Time Alignment: Computed from trailing 20 days

Description: On-Balance Volume: cumulative volume with sign based on price direction (raw cumulative value)
Time Alignment: Computed from full price history

Description: Total quarterly revenue from most recent filing before row date
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarterly operating income (revenue minus operating expenses)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarterly net income (bottom line profit after all expenses and taxes)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarterly diluted earnings per share
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Operating income divided by revenue (negative = operating loss)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Net income divided by revenue (negative = net loss)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total assets from quarterly balance sheet
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total debt (short-term + long-term borrowings)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total stockholders' equity (assets minus liabilities)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Stockholders' equity divided by shares outstanding
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total current assets (cash + receivables + inventory etc.)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Total debt divided by stockholders' equity (leverage ratio)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Current assets divided by current liabilities (liquidity measure)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Return on equity: net income / stockholders' equity (profitability)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Return on assets: net income / total assets (asset efficiency)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Capital expenditures (investment in property/equipment)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarter-over-quarter revenue growth rate (current vs prior quarter)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: Quarter-over-quarter net income growth rate
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent quarterly filing

Description: CBOE Volatility Index closing value (market fear gauge)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: 10-year US Treasury yield (risk-free rate benchmark)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: 13-week US Treasury bill rate (proxy for short-term interest rate / fed funds rate)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: 10-year minus 2-year Treasury yield (recession signal when inverted)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: S&P 500 cumulative return over trailing 20 days (broad market momentum)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: S&P 500 cumulative return over trailing 60 days (3-month market trend)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: S&P 500 annualized 20-day return volatility (market risk level)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: US Dollar Index 20-day return (currency strength)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: Gold price 20-day return (safe haven demand)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: Crude oil price 20-day return (energy/inflation proxy)
Time Alignment: Daily time-indexed

Description: Earnings surprise: (actual EPS - estimated EPS) / |estimated EPS| * 100 from most recent reported quarter
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent reported earnings
NaN Handling: Semantic fill: 0.0 when no earnings (22.9% NaN)

Description: Actual reported EPS from most recent earnings release
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent reported earnings
NaN Handling: Semantic fill: 0.0 when no earnings (20.9% NaN)

Description: Number of calendar days since the most recent earnings report
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent reported earnings

Description: Number of calendar days until the next scheduled earnings report
Time Alignment: Aligned to next known earnings date

Description: Net income from most recent SEC 10-Q/10-K filing (independent of YFinance)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent filing before row date

Description: Operating cash flow from most recent SEC filing
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent filing before row date

Description: Number of days since the most recent SEC filing (staleness measure)
Time Alignment: Aligned to most recent filing before row date
